title: Teacher misconduct panel outcome: Ms Dolores Celine Cecile Papin
body: "The Secretary of State does not make these decisions himself. They are made by a senior official on the recommendation of an independent panel.     Teacher reference number: 0264448   Teacher’s date of birth: 12 January 1977   Location teacher worked: Banbury, South East England   Date of professional conduct panel: 16 May 2019   Outcome type: Prohibition order     Notice is hereby given that, in accordance with The Teachers’ Disciplinary (England) Regulations 2012, a professional conduct panel was convened to consider the case of Ms Dolores Celine Cecile Papin, formerly employed in Banbury, South East England.  The proceedings were held at 5 Cheylesmore House, 5 Quinton Road, Coventry, CV1 2WT at 9.30am on 16 May 2019.   Teacher misconduct   Ground Floor, South Cheylesmore House 5 Quinton RoadCoventryCV1 2WT     Email TRA.Casework@education.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7593 5393    Information about regulating the teaching profession and the process for dealing with serious teacher misconduct.   "
